en: What's the matter, Mama? I'm dying, Forrest.
ko: 나 죽어가고 있어, 포레스트. 들어와서 여기 앉아.

en: Come on in. Sit down over here.
It's my time. It's just my time.
Oh, now. Don't you be afraid, sweetheart.
Death is just a part of life, something we are all destined to do.
ko: 죽음은 삶의 일부일 뿐이야. 우리 모두가 겪어야 할 일이야.

en: I didn't know it, but I was destined to be your mama.
ko: 나도 몰랐지만, 너희 엄마가 되는 게 내 운명이었어.

en: I did the best I could. You did good, Mama.
ko: 내가 할 수 있는 최선을 다했어.

en: Well, I happen to believe you make your own destiny.
ko: 난 자기 운명은 스스로 만드는 거라고 믿어.

en: You have to do the best with what God gave you.
ko: 하나님이 준 걸로 최선을 다해야 해. 내 운명은 뭐야, 엄마?
